title: Synthetix perps in Infinex
deployed_facts: Synthetix is integrated in Infinex as a perps provider alongside Hyperliquid (third provider Lighter also present in the platform codebase)
Synthetix is a decentralized derivatives exchange offering perpetual futures on Ethereum mainnet, quoted and settled in USDT
Synthetix perps use a central limit order book (CLOB), with cross-margin across all positions in a subaccount
Synthetix perps markets: BTC, ETH, SOL, XRP, DOGE, ZEC, FARTCOIN, 1000PEPE, XMR, PUMP (all quoted in USDT)
Synthetix perps max leverage: 50x on BTC, ETH, SOL, XRP, DOGE; 25x on ZEC and 1000PEPE; 10x on FARTCOIN, XMR, PUMP
Synthetix perps collateral: USDT on Ethereum mainnet; direct USDT deposits only (no swidge); minimum deposit and withdrawal are $50
Synthetix perps deposits settle in approximately 5 minutes
Infinex existing perps provider before Synthetix: Hyperliquid
Synthetix perps integration is fully implemented in the Infinex platform codebase; public-facing availability is to be confirmed at ship time (do not assert 'live' until confirmed)
